text: Resource type: bachelor thesis. Undergraduate thesis, academic thesis.
Resource type: master thesis. Graduate thesis, diploma thesis.
Resource type: doctoral dissertation. PhD thesis, doctoral thesis.
Resource type: habilitation thesis. Postdoctoral thesis.
Resource type: research report. Scientific report, technical report.
Resource type: textbook. Lecture notes, study materials, educational material.
Resource type: technical specification. Technical document, specification.
Resource type: annual report. Yearly report, organizational report.
Resource type: laboratory manual. Experimental guide, lab manual.
Resource type: presentation. Slides, conference presentation.
Resource type: article. Journal article, scientific article, research paper.
Resource type: journal article. Academic article, scientific article, research paper.
Resource type: book. Monograph, scientific book.
Resource type: book chapter. Chapter in book, section of monograph.
Resource type: conference proceedings. Proceedings paper, conference publication.
Resource type: preprint. Unpublished article, preprint paper.
Resource type: working paper. Discussion paper, preliminary study.
Resource type: case study. Case analysis, study report.
Resource type: lecture notes. Course notes, teaching material.
Resource type: standard. Norm, official standard document.
Resource type: guideline. Recommendation, best practice.
Resource type: regulation. Legal rule, directive, regulation.
Resource type: technical regulation. Regulatory specification, technical rule.
Resource type: specification. Technical specification, system specification.
